title: GlitchDex - Cobblemon
body:
(If you want to use Any Assets from this Pack, Please contact me through Discord!)

This Cobblemon Resource Pack adds some Pokemon that can't be obtained into Cobblemon!
(For Proper Sizes and Hitboxes, Add a copy of this pack to your world's datapacks Folder!)

Current Pokemon:
- Capsakid - Savanna
- Scovillan - Savanna
- Croagunk - Swamp
- Toxicroak - Swamp
- Many more to Come!

Thanks to Ozzy from PokeGems for formating the folders, and donating their Croagunk line!

Need help, want to suggest a Pokemon? Talk about it here! https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1280691830597619774
